title: Section 7C
content: 1[7C. Disqualifications for the presiding officers of Labour Courts, Tribunals and National Tribunals. --No person shall be appointed to, or continue in, the office of the presiding officer of a Labour Court, Tribunal or National Tribunal, if-- (a) he is not an independent person; or (b) he has attained the age of sixty-five years.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 36 of 1956, s. 4, for section 7 (w.e.f. 10-3-1957).
